title: Jacques Hillairet
highlights: Auguste André Coussillan (31 July 1886 – 15 April 1984) was a French historian specialising in the history of Paris. Under the pen-name Jacques Hillairet he wrote two major reference works on the subject in the 1950s - Connaissance du vieux Paris and Dictionnaire historique des rues de Paris.  ...    From 1951, Hillairet published a series of three books with Editions de Minuit. These were followed in 1956 by the three volumes of the Connaissance du Vieux Paris series. He also directed the Évocation du Grand Paris series,  ...    - Évocation du vieux Paris. highlights:
